histogram.name: PersonalContext.FetchContext.ErrorStatus.{ContextMemoryFeature}
histogram.summary: Records the specific execution error code when fetching context from the Context Memory Service fails for the {ContextMemoryFeature} capability. Recorded on request failure.

histogram.name: PersonalContext.FetchContext.Latency.{ContextMemoryFeature}
histogram.summary: Records the duration in milliseconds taken to completely fetch context from the Context Memory Service for the {ContextMemoryFeature} capability. Recorded upon request completion or failure.

histogram.name: PersonalContext.FetchContext.Result.{ContextMemoryFeature}
histogram.summary: Records whether the context was successfully fetched from the Context Memory Service for the {ContextMemoryFeature} capability. Recorded upon request completion or failure.

histogram.name: PersonalContext.FetchPiiEntities.ErrorStatus.{ContextMemoryFeature}
histogram.summary: Records the specific execution error code when fetching PII entities from the Context Memory Service for the {ContextMemoryFeature} capability. Recorded on request failure.

histogram.name: PersonalContext.FetchPiiEntities.Latency.{ContextMemoryFeature}
histogram.summary: Records the duration in milliseconds taken to completely fetch PII entities from the Context Memory Service for the {ContextMemoryFeature} capability. Recorded upon request completion or failure.

histogram.name: PersonalContext.FetchPiiEntities.Result.{ContextMemoryFeature}
histogram.summary: Records whether the PII entities were successfully fetched from the Context Memory Service for the {ContextMemoryFeature} capability. Recorded upon request completion or failure.

histogram.name: PersonalContext.NoticeInteractions
histogram.summary: Records the user interaction with the Personal Context notice. Recorded when the notice is shown to the user, and when the user accepts or dismisses it.
